shortDescription: Scoped read-only Azure estate, cost, quota, and health operations through the official Azure MCP Server.

externalAccountsNeeded.description: Azure access through Azure CLI login, managed identity, or equivalent Azure Identity credential context

capabilityGroups.shortDescription: Inspect subscriptions, resource groups, Function Apps, storage accounts, and resource inventories.
useWhen: you need to list subscriptions or resource groups before acting
you want to inspect which resources exist in a given resource group
you need read-only visibility into Function Apps or storage accounts

capabilityGroups.shortDescription: Check Azure retail pricing and regional quota readiness for planned workloads.
useWhen: you need to verify SKU pricing before provisioning
you want to confirm whether a region has quota headroom for planned resource types

capabilityGroups.shortDescription: Inspect activity logs, Azure Resource Health, and service health events for operational triage.
useWhen: you need to inspect why an Azure resource failed to deploy or changed state
you want the current health or recent service events affecting Azure resources

orchestratorUseCases: inspect Azure subscription and resource-group state before provisioning support infrastructure
check quota and pricing readiness for Azure workload planning
triage Azure runtime incidents through activity logs and resource health without enabling destructive operations

maintenanceTasks.name: review-azure-mcp-readonly-slice
maintenanceTasks.description: Reassess the explicit Azure MCP tool allowlist when HelkinSwarm needs additional namespaces or when upstream tool annotations materially change.

tools.name: azuremcp_subscription_list
tools.description: List Azure subscriptions visible to the current credential context and identify the default subscription when one exists.
useWhen: you need to see which Azure subscriptions are available before running a more specific query
avoidWhen: you already know the target subscription and need a resource-specific query instead
typicalInputs: list my subscriptions
which Azure subscription is default
tools.returnsSummaryShape: Azure subscriptions with display name, subscription id, state, tenant id, and default marker

tenant.description: Optional tenant id or tenant display name to scope the subscription lookup.

tools.name: azuremcp_group_list
tools.description: List Azure resource groups in a subscription.
useWhen: you need to inspect which Azure resource groups exist in a subscription
avoidWhen: you need resources within a specific group rather than the groups themselves
typicalInputs: list resource groups in my subscription
show groups in subscription X
tools.returnsSummaryShape: Azure resource group names and ids

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

tools.name: azuremcp_group_resource_list
tools.description: List Azure resources inside a specific resource group.
useWhen: you need to inventory the resources inside one Azure resource group
avoidWhen: you need details for a single resource rather than a group inventory
typicalInputs: list resources in rg-helkinswarm-prod
what is in this resource group
tools.returnsSummaryShape: resource names, ids, types, and locations for a resource group

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

resourceGroup.description: Azure resource group name to inspect.

tools.name: azuremcp_functionapp_get
tools.description: List Azure Function Apps or get details for a specific Function App.
useWhen: you need read-only visibility into Azure Function Apps in a subscription or resource group
avoidWhen: you need to deploy or mutate Function App settings
typicalInputs: list function apps in my resource group
show the details for function app helkinswarm-func
tools.returnsSummaryShape: Function App details including name, location, status, and App Service plan

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

functionApp.description: Optional Function App name when targeting a specific app.

tools.name: azuremcp_storage_account_get
tools.description: Get details for Azure Storage accounts, including SKU, location, and security-relevant configuration flags.
useWhen: you need to inspect storage account configuration without mutating it
avoidWhen: you need to create containers or upload blobs
typicalInputs: show my storage accounts
get the details for storage account mystorage
tools.returnsSummaryShape: storage account inventory or detailed account settings

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

account.description: Optional Azure Storage account name when targeting one account.

tools.name: azuremcp_pricing_get
tools.description: Get Azure retail pricing for a specific service, region, or SKU. Use this after the request is specific enough to avoid guesswork.
useWhen: you need a concrete Azure pricing lookup for a known service, SKU, region, or filter
avoidWhen: the request only names a broad service and still needs SKU clarification
typicalInputs: price Standard_D4s_v5 in eastus
get SQL Database pricing in westeurope
tools.returnsSummaryShape: Azure retail pricing matches for the supplied filters

currency.description: Optional currency code such as USD or EUR.

sku.description: Optional ARM SKU name such as Standard_D4s_v5.

service.description: Optional Azure service name such as Virtual Machines or SQL Database.

region.description: Optional Azure region such as eastus or westeurope.

serviceFamily.description: Optional service family such as Compute, Storage, or Databases.

priceType.description: Optional price type such as Consumption, Reservation, or DevTestConsumption.

includeSavingsPlan.description: Optional flag to include savings plan pricing where supported.

filter.description: Optional raw OData filter for advanced pricing lookups.

tools.name: azuremcp_quota_usage_check
tools.description: Check Azure regional quota availability for planned resource types before provisioning.
useWhen: you need to validate quota headroom for a set of Azure resource types in a region
avoidWhen: you only need static pricing rather than capacity readiness
typicalInputs: check eastus quota for container apps and cognitive services
do we have quota for these resource types in westus2
tools.returnsSummaryShape: regional quota and usage readiness for the requested Azure resource types

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

region.description: Azure region such as eastus or westeurope.

resourceTypes.description: Comma-separated Azure resource types such as Microsoft.App/containerApps,Microsoft.Web/sites.

tools.name: azuremcp_monitor_activitylog_list
tools.description: List Azure activity log events for a specific resource to diagnose deployments, state changes, or access patterns.
useWhen: you need to inspect what happened to an Azure resource over the last few hours
avoidWhen: you need platform-wide service health rather than a resource activity trail
typicalInputs: show the last 24 hours of activity logs for this function app
why did this storage account change
tools.returnsSummaryShape: activity log events with timestamp, operation, status, and caller information

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

resourceGroup.description: Optional Azure resource group containing the resource.

resourceType.description: Optional resource type such as Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts when disambiguation is needed.

eventLevel.description: Optional activity-log level such as Error, Warning, or Informational.

top.description: Optional maximum number of events to return.

tools.name: azuremcp_resourcehealth_availability_status_get
tools.description: Get Azure Resource Health availability status for a resource or resource group.
useWhen: you need the current availability or health status for an Azure resource
avoidWhen: you need subscription-wide service advisories rather than a specific resource health check
typicalInputs: is this VM healthy
get the availability status for this storage account
tools.returnsSummaryShape: resource health state such as Available, Unavailable, Degraded, or Unknown with details

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

resourceId.description: Optional full Azure resource id for the target resource.

resourceGroup.description: Optional Azure resource group name when checking multiple resources in a group.

tools.name: azuremcp_resourcehealth_health_events_list
tools.description: List Azure service health events such as incidents, advisories, planned maintenance, and security events.
useWhen: you need recent Azure service incidents, advisories, or maintenance events affecting a subscription
avoidWhen: you need current health for one specific resource rather than subscription-level service events
typicalInputs: show active Azure incidents
list planned maintenance events in this subscription
tools.returnsSummaryShape: service health events with tracking id, title, event type, status, timing, and impacted services

subscription.description: Optional Azure subscription id or display name.

eventType.description: Optional event type such as ServiceIssue, PlannedMaintenance, HealthAdvisory, or Security.

status.description: Optional status filter such as Active or Resolved.

trackingId.description: Optional tracking id for a specific service health event.

queryStartTime.description: Optional ISO 8601 start time for the query window.

queryEndTime.description: Optional ISO 8601 end time for the query window.
